Apply the following settings manually in Engine.ini.
guidance.code:
[SystemSettings]
r.TranslucencyLightingVolumeDim=64
r.RefractionQuality=2
r.SSR.Quality=4
r.SceneColorFormat=3
r.DetailMode=2
r.TranslucencyVolumeBlur=1
r.MaterialQualityLevel=1
r.SSR.Temporal=0
